title: TumorQuantAI parameters
description: TumorQuantAI schema for the public per-slide workflow, including internal testing and container-plumbing parameters.

input_dir.description: Root containing exported primary slides; required for a run.

output_dir.description: Published result root; required for a run and distinct from input_dir.

sample_sheet.description: Optional CSV/TSV with sample_id and slide_path columns.

slide_patterns.description: Primary-slide glob or list of globs; a comma-separated string is also accepted.

include.description: fnmatch include filter over inferred sample IDs.

exclude.description: fnmatch exclude filter over inferred sample IDs.

worker_script.description: Internal/testing override for the per-slide Python worker.

container_image.description: Task container image; profiles may replace this base default.

docker_run_options.description: Internal trusted Docker options assembled by run.sh.

max_retries.description: Retries after the first failed attempt.

continue_on_error.description: Continue the cohort after a slide exhausts retries.

mpp.description: Requested microns per pixel for model tiles.

slide_mpp.description: Verified physical microns per pixel of the source L0; required when embedded metadata is absent or unreliable.

tile_px.description: Requested tile edge; the worker adjusts non-multiples of 14.

background_fraction.description: Maximum background fraction for retained tiles.

max_sampled_patches.description: Maximum exported sampled patches; zero means no cap.

collage.description: Optional square patch collage in NxN form, for example 4x4.

device.description: Inference device; profiles normally replace the base CUDA default.

num_workers.description: DataLoader workers inside each slide task.

run_cells_stage.description: Run optional cell segmentation before HistoPLUS typing.

histoplus_revision.description: Immutable full commit SHA for Owkin-Bioptimus/histoplus. Override only with another reviewed 40-hex commit.

histoplus_weight_file.description: Optional existing gated model weight file. It is mounted read-only and never published.

histoplus_weight_sha256.description: Internal content identity computed by run.sh for a local gated weight file.

histoplus_cache_dir.description: Weight-cache directory inside the task environment.

convert_to_pyramidal.description: Convert non-pyramidal input TIFFs before inference.

pyramidal_tile.description: Tile edge for pyramidal BigTIFF conversion.

pyramidal_jpeg_q.description: JPEG quality when pyramidal compression is jpeg.

zoom_size.description: Automatic zoom-window size in level-0 pixels.

qc_patch_count.description: Dense QC patch overlays per slide.

qc_patch_size.description: QC patch edge in level-0 pixels.

plain_csv.description: Write plain coordinate CSV instead of gzip-compressed CSV.

save_json.description: Write the optional GeoJSON-like per-cell export.

allow_mixed_sampling.description: Allow aggregation across differing percentages or seeds.
